description: The Valle clan is a 'Ndrangheta group originally from Reggio Calabria, Italy, that relocated to Vigevano and Cisliano in the 1980s. Allied with the Lampada family and linked to the De Stefano clan, they are active in real estate, gambling, and restaurants. The clan faced arrests in the 1990s, and their confiscated property, La Masseria, was assigned to the municipality of Cisliano in 2021 after a prolonged legal and community struggle.
